popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Comte de Corbeil, chatelain de Rochefort-en-Yvelines. Guy I, seigneur de Montlhéry was born circa 1009.2 He was the son of Thibaud "Fille-Etoupe", seigneur de Bray & de Montlhéry and N. N. (?).1 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery於大約1037年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利時，他的父親Guy de Montlhéry I29歲，母親Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte34歲。他於1071年之後與Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1095年登記服兵役。他去世於1108年11月26日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌蒙特爾賀利享年72歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery于大约1037年出生在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利时，他的父亲Guy de Montlhéry I29岁，母亲Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte34岁。他于1071年之后与Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1095年登记服兵役。他去世于1108年11月26日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌蒙特爾賀利享年72岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery was born about 1037, in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France, his father, Guy de Montlhéry I, was 29 and his mother, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, was 34. He married Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE after 1071. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1095. He died on 26 November 1108, in Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery est né environ 1037, à Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Guy de Montlhéry I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE après 1071. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1095. Il est décédé le 26 novembre 1108, à Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery um 1037 in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Montlhéry I 29 und seine Mutter Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte 34. Er hat nach 1071 Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1095 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 26. November 1108 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery è nato il circa 1037 nel Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, il suo padre, Guy de Montlhéry I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE dopo il 1071. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1095. Morì il 26 novembre 1108, nel Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlheryが約1037年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントルheリーで生まれた時，父Guy de Montlhéry Iは29歳，母Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferteは34歳であった。1071年以後にAdélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1095年に兵役登録をした。彼は1108年11月26日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンモントルheリーで72歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery(이)가 대략 1037년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽he리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Montlhéry I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1071년 이후 Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1108년 11월 26일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 몽he리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery nasceu aproximadamente 1037, em Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, França, seu pai, Guy de Montlhéry I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE após 1071. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1095. Ele faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1108, em Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery родился около 1037 г. в местности монтлхeри, сине-ет-оис, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy de Montlhéry I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE после 1071 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1095 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 26 ноября 1108 г. в местности монтлхeри, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

sm.from 1095 to 1104: mai le 1095 e o'o I le 1104

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy II  aka Le Rouge de Montlhery nació aproximadamente 1037, en Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, su papá, Guy de Montlhéry I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adélaïde Elisabeth DE CORBEILLE después de 1071. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1095. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1108, en Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
